opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: If I sit up my heart starts racing out of my chest, my vision goes black, and my legs give way. It's been getting really bad over the last few days and tonight I nearly collapsed just walking to the bathroom.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: It's much worse the last 3 days — I can't stand up for even half a minute without feeling like I'm going to pass out, and my parent is worried I'll fall and hurt myself.

symptom_narrative.onset: the heart racing and dizziness on standing started after a viral illness a while ago, but it has flared up badly over the last 3 days
symptom_narrative.duration: worse for about 3 days, and tonight I can barely stay upright at all
symptom_narrative.character: when I stand or sit up my heart pounds and races, my vision tunnels and goes black, I get really dizzy and my legs feel weak and give way
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the worst it's ever been — I can't stay upright for more than about 30 seconds before I feel like I'll faint
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: my whole body feels weak and my head goes dizzy; the racing feeling is in my chest
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: it happens every time I sit up or stand; it eases off when I lie back down flat
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: lying down flat — within a minute or so the racing settles and the dizziness lifts
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: sitting up, standing, walking, being upright for more than about half a minute
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: really profound exhaustion and fatigue; feeling pale and a bit anxious when I try to be upright
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: I've had this postural dizziness on and off since the viral illness, but nothing like this bad before
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: I'm basically bedbound tonight and need help from my parent just to move or get to the bathroom

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: a viral illness a while back that I never fully recovered from — I've been getting dizzy on standing and very tired ever since

current_medications_as_reported.name_as_patient_states: nothing regular — I'm not on any heart or blood pressure tablets

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: adolescent living at home, parent is present and helping with hydration, transfers and safety tonight

paediatric_context.developmental_concerns: none reported; a parent is present and assisting with hydration, transfers and fall safety

objective_data_offered.value: when I sit up or stand my heart pounds and races and my vision goes black and my legs give way; it settles when I lie flat again
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient-reported sensation — no home blood-pressure cuff or heart-rate/wearable device readings offered

objective_data_offered.value: I nearly collapsed walking to the bathroom tonight — I didn't actually black out or fall, my parent caught me and I got back to bed
totally wiped out and exhausted, can barely move, feel like I have no energy at all
looks pale and anxious when sitting up and immediately wants to lie back down; lying flat and appears exhausted
parent reports she is bedbound tonight and needs physical help for every transfer; high fall risk
I've been able to sip fluids that my parent is bringing me, and I'm still passing urine
